name: AudioRace
short_description: Audiorace is an accessible audio game full of adrenaline and smell of burnt tires! Let the sound guide you and race your way to the top.
detailed_description:
Put the pedal to the metal in AudioRace, a heart-pounding racing game designed with accessibility at its core, tailored for visually impaired players.

Feel the Race Like Never Before

Navigate tracks using immersive audio cues, guiding you to every curve, straightaway, and victory line.

Choose Your Ride

From sleek sports cars to powerful muscle machines, find the perfect engine roar to match your style.

Race Across Diverse Tracks

Hear the twists and turns of dynamic environments and push your skills to the limit.

Beat the Best Times

Challenge yourself to shatter records and become the ultimate audio racing champion!

Whether you're a speed enthusiast or a gamer seeking an inclusive thrill, AudioRace offers adrenaline-pumping action where sound leads the way. Ready to race? 🎶
